overall.description: A nighttime exploration of an elevated NCART train platform in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The camera slowly pans across neon-lit billboards including a prominent 'EEZYBEEF' advertisement, tilts up to reveal the moon through the hazy sky, and surveys the distant illuminated skyscrapers while pedestrians stand along the platform edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train platform with neon advertisements

events.description: camera begins panning left along the platform revealing the teal Vista neon sign
camera tilts upward to reveal the clear night sky and full moon above the platform roof

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left along the platform, examining the illuminated billboards and neon signage

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing together near the far end of the platform

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement display for EEZYBEEF canned food featuring the slogan 'So fresh IT WRIGGLES IN YOUR MOUTH!'
simple concrete seating bench positioned on the platform walkway
vertical teal neon sign mounted on the building facade spelling 'VISTA'
elevated concrete pedestrian platform with safety railings and overhead lighting
bright full moon visible through the hazy night sky above the platform structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens focused on the bright EEZYBEEF billboard before panning left along the elevated NCART platform. The camera reveals a teal neon 'VISTA' sign and two distant pedestrians standing near the platform end, then tilts upward to frame the full moon against the dark hazy sky above the platform roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: platform edge overlooking Night City skyline

events.description: camera begins panning right from the moon back down toward the platform level
view transitions from platform interior to open cityscape beyond the safety railing

agents.ego_description: panning right across the platform edge to survey the illuminated cityscape and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the atmospheric haze of Night City
metal safety railing with horizontal bars along the edge of the elevated platform

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right from the night sky, passing back across the EEZYBEEF billboard which moves from right to left in the frame, then opens up to reveal the sprawling Night City skyline beyond the platform railing. The distant towers glow with vertical neon lighting through the urban haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with digital advertisement displays

events.description: camera continues panning right while moving forward along the platform walkway

agents.ego_description: moving forward along the platform walkway while observing the digital advertisements and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket standing near the platform edge looking out at the city
pedestrian leaning against the wall near the digital advertisement screens

entered.detail: row of illuminated digital billboard displays mounted on the platform wall showing various advertisements
tall buildings in the distance featuring prominent vertical red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the platform walkway, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket and another leaning against the wall. The EEZYBEEF billboard and city skyline exit the frame as the view focuses on the row of digital advertisement screens lining the right wall, with distant neon-lit towers visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focus on vibrant platform advertisements before expanding to reveal the vast, neon-lit urban horizon of Night City. It begins centered on a bright EEZYBEEF billboard, panning left past a teal VISTA sign and distant pedestrians before tilting upward to frame the full moon against a dark, hazy sky. As the camera pans back to the right, it passes the EEZYBEEF sign once more, opening up to a wide vista of glowing skyscrapers and vertical neon lights shimmering through the city haze. The scene then shifts as the camera glides along the platform walkway, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket and another leaning against the wall. Finally, the skyline and main billboards exit the frame as the view settles on a row of digital advertisement screens lining the right wall with distant towers still visible in the background.
